title: Have a Kanban view in "My work"
excerpt:
Hello, I would like to have a “Kanban” view in “My work” in order to filter my tasks by status. Kanban views exist in boards but not in “My work”. 
Thanks in advance.

posts.author: Nolwenn.BZL (BIZEUL)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, I would like to have a “Kanban” view in “My work” in order to filter my tasks by status. Kanban views exist in boards but not in “My work”.

Thanks in advance.

posts.author: Filurisen (Therese)
posts.cookedHtml: We would also very much need a kanban view within “My work”. Currently I have my personal backlog within another system due to this and it´s creating double work for us.

posts.author: Julia1 (Julia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,
You can easily achieve that with Kanbanify app.

auth.monday.com

Kanbanify - monday.com App Marketplace

Work on multiple boards in a single Kanban view.

posts.author: YKarim (Yussef)
posts.cookedHtml: How is it possible to add the My Work to the Kanbanify? Im only allowed to do it with the normal boards, and not My Work.

posts.author: Julia1 (Julia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Sorry I did not explain it further.

You cannot add “My work” to Kanbanify" but you can achieve something similar like “My work” in a Kanban view.

You have to select the boards you want to connect, you can filter by your own user and you will see your tasks in a Kanban view.

You can use different filters to filter tasks and see only the ones that are relevant to you. You can also sort tasks using a criteria that fits your needs best.

You can reorder or hide Kanban columns.

Let me know if you have more questions. Happy to help.

Regards

posts.author: MickyWeirNSU (Micky)
posts.cookedHtml: SAME! This is a nightmare compared to Asana!

posts.author: elliemvrphy (Ellie)
posts.cookedHtml: 100% Agree this would be a super useful feature to have!
